Fixed: TestCaseGrader.verify_canaries now searches only agent_output_path. Removed input_files fallback from base class. SelfTestGrader already had its own override searching only input_files. All 386 tests pass, self-test 18/18 at 3/3/3/3/3.

Fixed: base TestCaseGrader._load_agent_data() no longer falls back to self._expected when no agent JSON is found — returns None instead, causing correctness to score 1. SelfTestGrader override unchanged. All 386 tests pass, self-test 18/18 at 3/3/3/3/3.

Added 8 focused tests in tests/test_grader_evidence.py covering: (1) normal grader canary search scoped to agent output only (bpt.1), (2) normal grader _load_agent_data returns None without agent JSON (bpt.2), (3) SelfTestGrader searches input files for canaries, (4) SelfTestGrader falls back to expected data for correctness. All pass.

Added 18 end-to-end grader regression tests covering: self-test pipeline (_run_self_test), normal grading pipeline (_grade_test_case), CLI entrypoint (main), and over-credit regression. Tests verify correctness fails without agent JSON, canaries require agent-output evidence, malformed JSON degrades gracefully, self-test path still scores 3/3/3/3/3, and batch grading writes aggregate reports.

Decision recorded. V1 registry is a static ScenarioPack dataclass with pack_id, display_name, test_cases, canary_file_keys, emitters, and dependencies. Default generation runs accounting-core only. Unknown packs fail fast. Dependencies are validated and topologically sorted. TC-01–TC-18 output is backward-compatible because the emitter sequence and canary key list are identical.

Implemented: extracted accounting-core emitters and canary keys into generator/packs/accounting_core.py with ScenarioPack registry in generator/packs/__init__.py. generate_test_suite.py now uses resolve_packs() and iterates pack emitters. All 412 tests pass, ruff clean, determinism verified.

Decision recorded. Defined 9 frozen dataclasses across legal.py (LegalContract, ContractClause, ContractAmendment, LegalDiligenceIssue) and hr_diligence.py (EmploymentAgreement, RetentionAward, SeveranceExposure, ContractorClassificationSignal, DiligenceRequest). ID conventions: LCTR/CLS/AMD/LDI/EA/RET/SEV/CCS/DR-NNN. All frozen, hardcoded tuples, cross-referencing existing CUST/VEND/entity IDs. EmploymentAgreement is a diligence superset of KeyPersonAgreement; both coexist. Design field in bead has full schema.

Implemented JudgmentTrap dataclass and JudgmentTrapRegistry with 5 trap types (summary_contradiction, missing_evidence, stale_document, scope_boundary, overconfident_conclusion) and 4 expected responses (flag, caveat, deprioritize, do_not_assert). JSON serialization with deterministic ordering. 19 tests covering all acceptance criteria.

Implemented 31 pytest tests covering: 6 prior-year xlsx workpapers, 4 docx memos, 5 current-year data files with format changes, file count totals, ERR-010 planted error, canary embedding for all 15 keys, manifest registration, prompt/expected_behavior, and format change flags.

Implemented 40 pytest tests covering: 6 section files (4 docx, 2 xlsx), cover page template + formatting guide PDF, section order verification, content checks for all sections, canary embedding, manifest registration, prompt/expected_behavior, and no-planted-errors assertion.

Implemented 53 pytest tests covering: fee constants validation, input file existence/format, client profile content, fee schedule structure and values, ERR-013 planted error verification, engagement template merge fields and sections, canary embedding, manifest registration, prompt/expected behavior content, and gold standard JSON output.

Implemented 51 pytest tests covering: DCF constants, historical financials xlsx (4 sheets), management projections xlsx (3 sheets + 200bps note), comparable companies xlsx (10 companies + summaries), industry overview PDF, planted errors ERR-022/ERR-025, canary embedding in all 4 input files, prompt/expected_behavior markdown, gold standard (WACC, EV ranges, equity, margin flag, UFCF, terminal values, canaries, errors, scoring hints).

Implemented 66 pytest tests covering: constants, base/deferral/sensitivity cash flow scenarios with exact gold-standard values, balance sheet/AR aging/AP aging xlsx structure, expenses docx, planted errors ERR-008 and ERR-024, canary embedding, prompt/expected_behavior markdown, and gold standard JSON.

Implemented: 45 pytest tests covering all 7 anomaly categories (duplicates, Benford, round-number, temporal, vendor, split, approver), CSV structure, canary, gold standard, and prompt/expected_behavior files. Also fixed missing mkdir in tc13.py _write_ap_csv.

Implemented: 44 pytest tests covering TC-12 Data Room Triage — data room structure (33 files, 7 subdirs), 65-item DD checklist, all 5 red flags (litigation, CEO golden parachute, Acme CoC, expiring patents, incomplete IP), ERR-021 planted error, canary embedding, gold standard structure, prompt/expected behavior, and manifest registration.

Implemented 48 pytest tests covering: 36-month P&L structure, 6 management adjustments with 2 traps, reported EBITDA ~$28.4M, adjusted EBITDA ~$29.3M, 8 customer contract PDFs, top customer 18% concentration, ERR-011 planted error, canary embedding, gold standard JSON, prompt/expected_behavior files, and manifest registration.

Implemented 62 tests covering: consolidated P&L, state factors (6 states, completeness, blanks), factor computation from canonical model, apportionment rules docx, state tax rates/formulas, ERR-003/ERR-023 planted errors, canary embedding, gold standard structure, prompt/expected behavior, manifest registration.

Extended GoldStandard with 5 optional fields: scenario_pack, service_line, evidence_expectations, judgment_traps, source_requirements. All omitted from JSON when empty for backward compatibility. 9 new tests covering serialization, deserialization, backward compat, deterministic ordering, and round-trip. All 879 tests pass.

Implemented generator/model/hr_diligence.py with 5 frozen dataclasses (EmploymentAgreement, RetentionAward, SeveranceExposure, ContractorClassificationSignal, DiligenceRequest) and hardcoded canonical data. 7 employment agreements (6 executed, 1 missing for Dr. Patel), 4 retention awards, 7 severance exposures, 4 contractor signals, 6 diligence requests. All cross-reference existing Cascade entities. 24 tests verify acceptance criteria: severance tied to salary, retention/severance double-count avoidance via greater-of, one missing executed agreement, contractor signals caveated as follow-up.

Implemented generator/model/legal.py with 10 legal contracts (LCTR-001 through LCTR-010), 9 contract clauses (CLS-001 through CLS-009), 3 amendments (AMD-001 through AMD-003), and 5 diligence issues (LDI-001 through LDI-005). All TC-19 required traps present: change-of-control consent (LDI-001), MFN clause (CLS-003), exclusivity (CLS-005), stale-summary contradiction (LDI-002), missing amendment gap (LDI-003). Cross-references CUST/VEND IDs from ar.py/ap.py. 38 tests in tests/test_legal.py all pass.

Implemented generator/writers/ package with legal.py (contract summaries, amendments, management summary memo, diligence request list) and hr.py (employment agreements, employee census, severance schedule, retention schedule, contractor roster, HR diligence requests). Shared deterministic save helpers in __init__.py. All documents embed canaries and use only supported formats (docx/xlsx). Management summary memo deliberately omits AMD-002/AMD-003 as TC-19 traps. 51 new tests verify file creation, canary embedding, content integrity, and byte-identical determinism.

Implemented TC-19 contract risk matrix formatter in generator/formatters/tc19.py. Emits 10 contract docx, 3 amendment docx, management summary memo, diligence request list xlsx, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, and gold standard. All files use canonical model data, canaries embedded, determinism verified. 992 existing tests pass.

Implemented TC-20 HR diligence exposure formatter in generator/formatters/tc20.py. Emits 7 employment agreement docx, employee census xlsx, severance schedule xlsx, retention plan xlsx, contractor roster xlsx, prompt.md, expected_behavior.md, and gold standard. All files use canonical model data from hr_diligence.py, canaries embedded, judgment traps for double-count avoidance/missing agreement/contractor classification. 992 existing tests pass.

Added 5 judgment traps to TC-20 gold (missing evidence, double-count avoidance, contractor caveats, source citations, severance verification). Added TC-19 and TC-20 rubric anchors to scoring/rubrics.yaml with concrete 3/2/1 anchors across all 5 dimensions. All 992 tests pass.

Added 6 judgment traps to TC-19 gold standard: change-of-control consent (JT-TC19-001), MFN contradiction (JT-TC19-002), exclusivity scope staleness (JT-TC19-003), government assignment consent (JT-TC19-004), IP license strategic dependency (JT-TC19-005), and primary source citation requirement (JT-TC19-006). Gold round-trip self-test passes. Rubric anchors were already concrete from the prior formatter bead. All 992 tests pass, determinism verified.

Added 9 diligence fields (4 legal, 5 HR) to CascadeModel with empty-tuple defaults for backwards compatibility. Wired hardcoded canonical tuples from legal.py and hr_diligence.py into build_model(). 11 new tests verify fields exist and defaults work. All 1003 tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented: 21 tests covering default registration, pack lookup, unknown-pack errors, list_packs ordering, resolve_packs (default/explicit/all/unknown), duplicate ID detection, dependency validation (missing/satisfied/circular), deterministic ordering, and helper functions.

Implemented TC-21 combined diligence findings formatter: curated mini data room (3 contracts, 2 amendments, 2 agreements, severance/retention schedules), management Q&A summary with embedded traps, combined legal+HR request tracker, prompt requiring 6 sections, expected behavior, gold standard with 6 evidence expectations and 5 judgment traps.

TC-21 gold standard was already implemented in tc21.py (from ups.19). Added TC-21 rubric entry in scoring/rubrics.yaml with concrete anchors for synthesis, evidence distinction, unresolved request tracking, calibrated language, and source citations across all 5 dimensions.

Implemented: legal/HR pack registered (generator/packs/legal_hr_diligence.py), generate() accepts pack_ids parameter, emit_all_golds scoped to active TCs. 11 e2e tests verify TC-19/20/21 generation, self-test, determinism, and default output isolation.

Decision recorded. V1 surface covers: seed, output_dir, and all company.* fields currently in config.yaml (company params, subsidiaries, growth rates, intercompany, employees, seasonal weights). canary_assignments and error_injections are build-time only. Unsupported fields (product lines, departments, salaries, legal/HR tuples, assets, bank, difficulty, pack selection, per-TC overrides) are explicitly enumerated and rejected with ConfigError. No version marker in v1; future v2 will add config_version field with automatic v1 fallback. Existing config.yaml is a valid v1 config with no changes needed.
Implemented ScenarioContext in generator/scenario_context.py with HMAC-SHA256 seed derivation. 13 tests cover stability, isolation, child contexts, and edge cases. Full suite (1048 tests) passes.
build_model() now accepts Config as first arg (config.seed used when provided, falls back to seed=42 kwarg for test compat). Orchestrator passes full Config. 1048 tests pass, determinism verified.

Added entities_from_config() adapter in entities.py that derives Entity dicts from CompanyConfig/SubsidiaryConfig. CascadeModel now carries entities/subsidiaries fields. build_model uses config-derived entities when config is provided, falls back to hardcoded constants otherwise. Default config produces identical entities to hardcoded constants. 4 new tests, 1052 total pass, determinism verified.

Added tests/test_baseline_regression.py with committed SHA-256 baseline (tests/baseline_checksums.json, 203 files). Test generates the default suite and compares every file's checksum against the baseline, reporting the first drifted path on failure. Includes regenerate_baseline() helper for intentional updates.

Updated README.md (pack IDs, TC-19–21, generation commands, file format policy, pack vs TC guidance), docs/architecture.md (scenario pack layer, legal/HR model modules), docs/scoring.md (evidence expectations, judgment traps), docs/adding-a-test-case.md (pack registration, file format policy). All link to SPEC.md and specs/.

Added check_evidence() to TestCaseGrader (searches agent output for required_sources and acceptable_terms) and SelfTestGrader (validates spec structure). Evidence dimension included in grade report only when evidence_expectations is present; backward-compatible for old golds. Aggregate reports include evidence stats. 11 new tests covering full credit, partial/fail, case insensitivity, backward compat, self-test, and aggregate inclusion. All 1064 tests pass.

Implemented: ManifestEntry has optional scenario_pack field. Manifest.set_current_pack() provides automatic tagging per-pack. Orchestrator sets pack context before running emitters. Field omitted from JSON when empty (backward-compatible). 6 new tests covering presence/absence, context, explicit override, determinism, and orchestrator integration.

Added evidence dimension to rubrics.yaml (generic anchors + per-TC anchors for TC-19/20/21). Expanded docs/scoring.md with detailed explanation of evidence scoring concepts: primary-source reliance, missing evidence, assumptions/limitations, caveated conclusions, scoring mechanics, and how judgment traps affect the standard dimensions. All 1070 tests pass.

Implemented: Added --packs CLI argument to generate_test_suite.py. Omitting --packs generates default (accounting-core only); --packs all generates every registered pack; --packs <name> selects specific packs; unknown packs exit with a clear error. Help text documents available packs. 5 new tests in test_orchestrator.py.

Decision recorded with concrete metrics: baseline is current SEED=42 output; fidelity measured via narrative realism Likert (≥3.5), 100% accounting-fact/canary/error preservation, byte-identical determinism with cache; go requires ≥0.5 Likert delta and zero regressions; no-go on any canonical figure alteration or <0.3 delta; opt-in via config flag with offline fallback; default generation remains deterministic and provider-free.

Added 24 regression tests in tests/test_override_roundtrip.py covering: override round-trip (8 tests), unsupported-field validation (8 tests), atomic save non-mutation (3 tests), and deep merge edge cases (5 tests). Tests define the contract for the layered config loader and draft service.

Updated docs/scoring.md with clear evidence semantics section distinguishing normal grading (searches agent outputs only) from self-test (validates generated benchmark structure). Documents what each check searches and proves in each mode, explains the SelfTestGrader subclass boundary, and cross-references the bpt.1/bpt.2 fixes that enforced this separation.

Revenue generation now accepts config for seasonal weights, growth rates, and entity revenue targets. Annual table and monthly allocation derive from Config when provided, falling back to hardcoded Cascade defaults. 8 new tests cover custom seasonal weights and quarterly-to-monthly conversion.

Spike complete. DataDesigner v0.5.6 successfully generated realistic lease narratives from canonical seed data via OpenRouter. Output quality is good (preserves all canonical facts), but direct adoption is not recommended: 50+ transitive deps, no built-in caching, requires live LLM provider at generation time. Recommendation: mimic the pattern with a thin ~200-line augmentation layer using httpx + local cache, keeping default generation offline and deterministic.

Design complete. Documented cache location (.augmentation_cache/), 5-component cache key (scenario_hash + tool_version + model_alias + prompt_hash + seed_namespace), manifest integration, lazy invalidation rules, disabled-by-default config, API surface (~200-line AugmentationCache class), and determinism guarantees for all three modes (disabled, cache-warm, cache-cold). Design is recorded in the bead's --design field for downstream beads (8ok.7.3 validators, 8ok.7.5 feature gate) to reference.

Implemented augmentation feature gate: AugmentationConfig (disabled by default) in config.py, AugmentationCache class in generator/augmentation.py with no-op disabled path, augmentation_source field on ManifestEntry, 22 tests covering disabled/enabled paths, cache key determinism, config parsing, and byte-identical output verification.

Implemented augmentation_validators.py with 4 validators: validate_required_facts (checks canonical names/dates present), validate_no_contradictions (detects wrong financial figures), validate_canary_preserved, validate_planted_error_preserved. Combined entry point validate_augmentation_output(). All return field-level ValidationMessage results. 28 tests in test_augmentation_validators.py, full suite green (1157 passed).

Parameterized generate_employees() to accept Config. When config provided, headcounts derived from subsidiary employee_count (parent = total_count - sum(subs)), turnover rate from config.company.employees.annual_turnover_rate, remote states from config.company.employees.remote_states. Aligned config.yaml employee_counts (330/270/210) with hardcoded constants so default config produces byte-identical output. 5 new tests (18 total), 1162 pass, no baseline drift.

Implemented model-level scenario invariant validation in generator/model/validation.py. Four check categories: (1) entity/headcount consistency, (2) GL balance verification, (3) FY2025 consolidated revenue tolerance (M-M), (4) IC netting across all fiscal years. All checks produce typed ValidationError objects. Tests in tests/test_model_validation.py cover happy path (default Cascade model passes all invariants) and error paths (unknown entity, headcount mismatch). All 1171 tests pass, ruff clean.

Added LeaseClause and ClauseType model types with source-document section/page references. Each lease now carries clauses for premises, commencement, term, rent, escalation, renewal, purchase option, and termination. Amendments carry their own clause references. authoritative_clause() method resolves amendments-override-originals. 10 new tests verify traceability, amendment authority, short-term identification, and determinism.

Centralized R&D time records, supply expenses, and QRE result into CascadeModel (TC-08). Centralized AP ledger into CascadeModel (TC-13). Formatters and gold standards now consume canonical model objects instead of regenerating with local RNGs. All 1181 tests pass, ruff clean, determinism verified.

Added tie-out tests verifying R&D time records, payroll, and QRE computation cross-referential integrity. CascadeModel R&D fields were already integrated (by ln9.7); this bead adds 13 new tests: arithmetic tie-outs (wage+supply=total, project breakdown sums), model-level reproducibility, employee↔roster cross-refs (existence, eligibility, entity, name match), W-2 salary bounds check, and non-qualifying project exclusion.

Implemented sales-to-cash lifecycle: Invoice and Receipt records in ar.py, AR aging/collections/allowance pre-computed in CascadeModel, invoice/receipt determinism tests added, AR consistency validation in validation.py. Collections not posted to GL to avoid NWC distortion (see build.py comment). 40 new/updated tests pass, baseline regenerated, determinism verified.

Implemented procure-to-pay lifecycle: normal AP ledger transactions now sum to vendor purchase targets from the AP subledger model. Added compute_vendor_annual_purchases() in ap.py, vendor-targeted normal transaction generation in ap_ledger.py, VendorSummary reconciliation data in APLedgerResult, and 4 tie-out tests. All 1208 tests pass, determinism verified.

Implemented tests/test_tc01.py with 41 tests covering: messy client TB structure (merged cells, abbreviations, debit/credit columns, account count), prior year workpaper (clean names, lead schedule mappings), signed financials PDF (pages, text-native, content, canary in author metadata), ERR-001 planted error (transposed digits, type, location, file), canary embedding in all 3 files, gold standard structure (mapping counts, variance analysis, tie-out with ERR-001, canary verification, error detection, scoring hints), prompt and expected behavior content, and manifest registration.

Implemented test_tc03.py with 55 tests covering: revenue XLSX (24 months, 6 PLs, units, ASPs), benchmark PDF (12 pages, pages 4/7/11), mgmt rep letter (8% claim), ERR-009 stale data, ERR-018 classification error, canary embedding, gold standard, prompt/expected_behavior, manifest, and constants.

Implemented test_tc02.py with 54 tests covering: bank CSV (340 txns, columns, comments), GL cash xlsx (structure, headers, entries), bank confirmation PDF (text-native, confirmation balance, metadata), ERR-002/ERR-004 planted errors, canary embedding (CSV comment, xlsx properties, PDF author), gold standard (reconciliation amounts, adjusted balances at $4,287,331, confirmation $4,312,117), prompt/expected behavior content, and manifest registration.

Implemented test_tc04.py with 46 tests covering: 15 lease PDFs (10 text-native, 3 scanned, 2 amendment), partial schedule xlsx (8/15 populated, 3 with blanks), ERR-007 date inconsistency, 2 short-term exemptions, canary embedding, gold standard, prompt/expected behavior, manifest registration.

Implemented: 56 tests covering AR aging schedule, confirmations summary, allowance analysis, workpaper memo template, ERR-016/ERR-020 planted errors, canary embedding, gold standard, prompt/expected behavior, and manifest registration.

Implemented test_tc06.py with 64 tests covering: consolidated TB, prior year workpaper (4 sheets), perm/temp differences docx, statutory rates docx, ERR-006 (stale 5.8% rate), ERR-012 (formula error double-counting), ETR range check, canary embedding in all 4 files, gold standard structure, prompt/expected_behavior, and manifest registration.

Implemented test_tc21.py with 64 tests covering: curated legal contracts (3), amendments (2), employment agreements (2), severance/retention schedules, management Q&A summary, diligence request tracker, judgment traps (LDI-001, SEV-001, DR-006, management-vs-source, no legal advice), canary embedding for all 11 files, gold standard with evidence expectations and 5 judgment traps, prompt/expected behavior, and manifest registration. All tests pass, ruff clean.

Implemented test_tc07.py with 40 tests covering: 8 K-1 PDFs, entity org chart, ERR-014 planted error, amended K-1 detection, canary embedding, gold standard structure, prompt/expected behavior, and manifest registration. All tests pass.

Added tests/test_tc08.py with 58 tests covering: time records CSV (~2,340 rows, 45 employees), 12 project description docx files, payroll xlsx, supply expenses xlsx, ERR-005 (mismatched payroll total), ERR-019 (classification error), credit ~$185K, canary embedding, gold standard, prompt/expected behavior, and manifest. Also fixed missing mkdir in tc08 formatter for CSV write.

Implemented: 47 tests covering all TC-20 outputs (7 agreements, census, severance, retention, contractor), prompt/expected_behavior, judgment traps (Patel double-count, missing EA-006, contractor signals), canary embedding in all 11 files, gold standard structure with evidence expectations and judgment traps, and manifest registration.

Implemented test_tc19.py with 55 tests covering: 10 contract summaries, 3 amendments, management summary memo (stale checks), diligence request list, prompt/expected behavior, all 5 LDI judgment traps, canary embedding in all 15 files, gold standard structure with evidence expectations and judgment traps, and manifest registration.

Implemented test_tc09.py with 53 tests covering: IC transactions xlsx (structure, columns, transaction types), comparable companies xlsx (12 companies, 2 rejected for SIC mismatch and distress), TP report PDF (page count, section content), IQR computation (Q1=4.2%, Q3=8.7%), services margin at 11.2% outside IQR, ERR-015 (wrong_entity) and ERR-017 (date_inconsistency) planted errors, canary embedding in all 3 files, gold standard structure and values, prompt/expected_behavior markdown, and manifest registration. Filed synth-data-iq3 for the 38-vs-42 page count discrepancy.
All 12 child test files (TC-01 through TC-09, TC-19 through TC-21) implemented and passing.

Added 4 pages of content: multi-year trend analysis, statistical methodology detail, subsidiary income summaries, and asset intensity comparison. PDF now produces exactly 42 pages. Determinism verified, all 1841 tests pass, grader self-test passes.

Design doc written: 9-layer merge stack, deep-merge with list-replace and null-delete semantics, v1 supported/unsupported field surface, seed behavior, validation timing, migration path. Saved in bead design field and docs/plans/customization-schema-v1.md.

Implemented: (1) Added _reject_unknown_keys validation to generator/config.py — enforces strict v1 field surface at top-level, company, and subsidiary scopes. (2) Wrote config-compatibility-v1.md policy doc covering backward compat, unknown-field rejection, versioning stance, CLI --config behavior, and layered override policy. (3) Added 10 new tests: unknown key rejection at all 3 levels, multi-key error reporting, build-time field acceptance, augmentation acceptance, optional subsidiary fields, version-less v1 loading, legacy config backward compat, no shared mutable state. All 1851 tests pass.

Implemented: Added DifficultyProfile, OutputProfile, ErrorProfile dataclasses with validation. Added deep_merge() with dict-recursive/list-replace/null-delete semantics. Added load_layered_config() for merging base + overlay YAML files. Updated allowed top-level keys. 34 new tests covering profile defaults, validation errors, deep merge semantics, layered loading with overrides/nulls/unknowns. All 1885 tests pass.

Implemented schema_metadata.py with FieldMeta dataclass, InputType/FieldGroup enums, field registries for all v1 groups (company, subsidiary, financial, difficulty, output, errors, generator), expand_subsidiary_fields() for template instantiation, is_unsupported_path() for v1 blocklist, and 31 passing tests covering all acceptance criteria groups.

Implemented: Added --overlay and --set CLI flags to generate_test_suite.py. --overlay accepts one or more YAML files merged onto the base config. --set accepts dotted-key=value pairs applied after overlays. Extended load_layered_config() with set_overrides parameter. Added 22 new tests (parse_set_overrides, _coerce_value, CLI integration, layered config with set_overrides). All 1944 tests pass.

Decision: Textual as optional dependency in [project.optional-dependencies.tui]. Rationale: only framework that natively supports multi-screen editing, validation panels, diff preview, and headless pilot tests. prompt_toolkit rejected (no layout engine), no-dep wizard rejected (poor effort/quality for required UX). Core generation path never imports textual. Service layer stays framework-agnostic. Full design recorded in bead design field.

Implemented TUI skeleton: generator/tui/ package with Textual app shell, __main__.py for module execution, 'configure' subcommand in CLI, pyproject.toml tui optional dependency, and 4 smoke tests passing.

Implemented DraftService in generator/tui/draft_service.py with load (base + overlays + draft file), set_field with coercion/validation, reset_field/reset_all, validate (via config loader), diff (field-level deltas), and atomic save. 33 unit tests covering all acceptance criteria.

Implemented DifficultyOutputScreen in generator/tui/difficulty_output_screen.py with Textual Screen subclass rendering difficulty fields (error_density, canary_visibility, judgment_trap_density) and output fields (enabled_test_cases, enabled_packs). Includes is_unsupported_difficulty_output_path helper for field-scope gating. 42 tests covering valid/invalid updates, metadata, unsupported-field rejection, combined workflows, and save/load round-trips.

Added LIST_INT input type handling for fiscal years. 51 passing tests cover field metadata, valid/invalid updates, subsidiary template expansion, unsupported-field rejection, screen helper, and save/reload roundtrip.
Implemented ConfigPreviewScreen with diff table, YAML preview, and change summary. 22 tests cover empty diff, changed-field diff, and read-only guarantee.

Implemented: ValidationPanel widget with error grouping by section, field-path extraction, clickable GoToField navigation, reactive state, and auto-hide on valid. Integrated into both CompanyProfileScreen and DifficultyOutputScreen. 17 tests pass covering grouping, extraction, and the full invalid->error->corrected->valid acceptance flow.

Added pre-save validation (rejects invalid merged config), overwrite protection (FileExistsError unless force=True), and acceptance-criteria test (saved YAML reloads through load_layered_config). Atomic write was already implemented.

Implemented: 32 integration tests covering service state transitions, metadata coverage, validation/save blocking, draft import, CLI arg parsing, and headless smoke tests. All tests pass in normal pytest without Textual rendering.
Already fixed in commit 4964ecc — test uses validate=False and passes. All 51 tests in test_company_profile_screen.py pass.

Screen implemented with TC-01–TC-18 catalogue, empty-state v1 messaging, helper methods (get_tc_ids, get_tc_title, has_overrides), and 11 tests covering catalogue completeness, edit/reset/unsupported-field behavior.

Added generation_run_screen.py with build_generate_command (pure command builder), format_command (shell-safe formatting), and GenerationRunScreen (validation status + command preview + subprocess execution). 16 tests cover all command construction paths without running actual generation.

Implemented: 5 preset YAML overlays (easy-mode, flat-seasonality, high-growth, higher-noise, small-company) covering company, difficulty, and seasonal parameters. All use only v1 fields. 15 parametrized tests validate parsing, merge, and field compliance. All pass.

Matrix defined with 5 supported families (XLSX, CSV, DOCX, PDF text-native, PDF scanned-style), 3 excluded families with rationale, noise dimensions per family, canary/error preservation risks, and pilot implementation guidance for synth-data-8ok.5. Stored in bead --design field.

Implemented generator/noise.py with deterministic noise helpers for XLSX (header perturbation, trailing whitespace, date format variation), CSV (trailing whitespace, quoting variation, BOM insertion), and DOCX (font jitter, paragraph spacing, metadata clutter). All helpers accept ExclusionZone to protect canary cells, planted-error cells, and model facts. make_noise_rng() derives per-file seeds from ScenarioContext namespace 'noise:{tc_id}:{file_key}'. 18 tests in tests/test_noise.py cover determinism, canary preservation, exclusion zones, and all three families. PDF families intentionally deferred (second wave per matrix recommendation).

Implemented fidelity regression report module (generator/model/fidelity_report.py) with 10 passing tests covering structure, determinism, and data-shape sanity checks for revenue/AR/cash, AP/anomalies, R&D/QRE, leases, tax, IC netting, and legal/HR counts.

Added docs/customization.md covering config layering, CLI usage (--overlay, --set), seed behavior, all v1 supported fields, bundled presets, validation, and future limitations. Added doc link to README docs table. Updated README generation section with overlay/packs examples.

Created docs/tui-scenario-configuration.md covering launch command, all screens (company profile, difficulty/output, TC overrides, validation panel, config preview/diff, save, generation run), equivalent CLI command, override YAML format, validation workflow, v1 limitations, and keybindings.

Decision recorded. European variants ship as dedicated pack 'cascade_europe_ifrs' with TC-XX-EU suffixed IDs, tc##eu_ file key prefixes, dependency on cascade_accounting_core, not included in default generation. See design field for full rationale on pack vs suffix vs inline-variant alternatives.

Decision recorded. European group is Cascade Europe Holdings B.V. (Netherlands) with 3 subsidiaries: Cascade Präzisionsteile GmbH (Munich, DE), Cascade Matériaux Avancés SAS (Lyon, FR), Cascade Distribution Services Ltd (Birmingham, UK). Profile covers entity codes (CE/CP/CM/CD), legal forms, VAT IDs, corporate tax rates, intercompany flows, R&D regimes (France CIR primary, Germany Forschungszulage secondary), OECD TP documentation, cross-border VAT treatment, GBP/EUR FX assumptions, and Pillar Two exclusion rationale. UK included as non-EU comparator for post-Brexit customs/VAT complexity.

Created specs/european-standards-reference.md with 10 standard entries covering IFRS 16, IAS 12, IAS 21, OECD TP Guidelines, OECD Pillar Two, France CIR, Germany Forschungszulage, EU VAT Directive, IAASB ISA, and EU company legal forms. Each entry has URL, scope note, affected TCs, and non-goal caveat. Linked from SPEC.md and cross-referenced from the European variants spec.

Design complete. TC-04-EU replaces ASC 842 with IFRS 16 single lessee model. Key differentiators: no operating/finance classification (judgment trap), low-value asset exemption (EUR ~4,500 threshold), European date format ambiguity (DD.MM.YYYY vs MM/DD), EUR comma-decimal formatting, EURIBOR-based IBR schedule, European lessors/locations across CE/CP/CM entities. 15 leases (same adversarial structure as TC-04): 3 scanned, 3 amended, 2 short-term exempt, 1 low-value exempt. Planted error ERR-EU-001 exploits DD/MM vs MM/DD date confusion. Design field on the bead has full specification.

Implemented TC-04-EU IFRS 16 lease extraction variant. Created: generator/model/leases_eu.py (15-lease EU portfolio with IFRS 16 model), generator/formatters/tc04_eu.py (PDFs, xlsx, prompt, expected_behavior, gold standard), generator/packs/cascade_europe_ifrs.py (new pack). Updated: packs/__init__.py, scoring/rubrics.yaml, generate_test_suite.py (ctx passthrough to golds), tests/baseline_checksums.json. All 2998 tests pass. Determinism verified. Self-test 3/3/3/3/3.

Design complete. TC-06-EU replaces ASC 740 with IAS 12 multi-jurisdiction provision across NL (25.8%), DE (29.9% composite KSt+SolZ+GewSt), FR (25% less CIR credit), UK (25% with GBP→EUR translation). Key differentiators from TC-06: multi-jurisdiction current tax instead of federal/state, weighted ETR reconciliation, IAS 12 recoverability assessment (no valuation allowance), no indefinite reversal exception, CIR as direct tax credit. Planted errors: ERR-EU-002 stale Munich Gewerbesteuer Hebesatz (480% vs 490%), ERR-EU-003 formula error in consolidated TB. Six judgment traps including Pillar Two non-applicability for sub-threshold group, ASC 740 terminology bleed, and single-rate vs per-jurisdiction computation. 4 input files with tc06eu_ canary prefix.

Implemented TC-06-EU: IAS 12 multi-jurisdiction provision for Cascade Europe group. Created tax_eu.py model (CE/CP/CM/CD with NL/DE/FR/UK rates, CIR+Forschungszulage credits, GBP→EUR translation), tc06_eu.py formatter (4 input files, prompt, expected behavior, gold with 6 judgment traps), 65 tests all passing, rubric in rubrics.yaml, pack registered. ERR-EU-002 (stale Hebesatz 480→490) and ERR-EU-003 (TB formula error) planted. Determinism verified.

Design complete. TC-07-EU replaces US K-1 extraction with multi-jurisdiction European partnership/transparent-entity investment reporting across NL (CV), DE (KG/Feststellungsbescheid), FR (SNC/SCI), and UK (LP/SA800). 8 investment statements in 4 languages. Key differentiators: no standardized K-1 box numbers (semantic extraction across formats), participation exemption analysis (NL deelnemingsvrijstelling/DE §8b KStG replaces Section 199A C-corp trap), §15a EStG/Dutch CV loss ring-fencing (replaces US at-risk/passive rules), GBP→EUR translation for UK partnerships, amended SNC statement mirrors TC-07 pattern (€340k→€285k + €55k mgmt fee), ERR-EU-004 ownership discrepancy between register (12%) and SCI PDF (15%). Two investing entities (CE and CP) require entity-level subtotals.

Implemented TC-07-EU: 8 multilingual allocation statement PDFs (DE/FR/NL/EN), investment register XLSX with ERR-EU-005 (4.8% vs 5.0% partner share), WHT summary XLSX, ERR-EU-004 (20% NRL vs 15% treaty), gold standard with participation exemption flags, rubric entry, and 48 tests all passing. Determinism verified. Full test suite 3,111 passed.

Design complete. TC-08-EU replaces US IRC Section 41 / ASC method with dual-jurisdiction European R&D incentive study: France CIR (30% of eligible costs including supplies + subcontractors with public-body 200% multiplier) for Cascade Matériaux Avancés SAS (CM, Lyon) and Germany Forschungszulage (25% of personnel costs only, capped at €2M/€500k max) for Cascade Präzisionsteile GmbH (CP, Munich). 14 projects (10 qualify, 2 borderline, 2 ineligible) across both jurisdictions in French/German. Key differentiators from TC-08: dual independent regimes vs single federal credit, fundamentally different eligible cost bases (CIR includes supplies+subs; Forschungszulage is personnel-only), different subcontractor treatment (CIR 200% public/face-value private; FZulG 60% of EU/EEA invoice), multilingual project descriptions, no incremental computation for CIR (volume-based). Two planted errors: ERR-EU-006 (CP supplies coded to R&D but ineligible for Forschungszulage — traps agents applying US QRE rules), ERR-EU-007 (CM public-body subcontractor at face value in file, should be 200% for CIR). Combined benefit ~€1.72M (CIR ~€1.28M + FZulG ~€435k). 5 input files + 14 project docx files.
Model, formatter, gold, tests (56 pass), and rubric all implemented. ERR-EU-008 classification_error type fixed. Test column indices fixed.

Design complete. TC-09-EU replaces US single-entity TP local file update with a multi-entity OECD master-file/local-file documentation exercise covering all 4 Cascade Europe entities (CE, CP, CM, CD). 5 intercompany flows tested: CP→CM raw materials (cost-plus-6%), CP→CD finished goods (cost-plus-8%), CE management fees (1.5%), CE→CM intercompany loan (€3M at 4.5%), CM→CP R&D royalty (3% of CP revenue). Key differentiators from TC-09: BEPS Action 13 two-tier document structure, multiple TP methods (TNMM for routine entities, CUP-like for loan, CUT for royalty), 25 comparables across 2 pools with 5 rejections (including OECD-specific size outlier), royalty direction verification trap requiring DEMPE awareness, dedicated interest rate benchmarking (EURIBOR + credit spread), management fee benefit test, new CD local file creation from scratch. Gold standard: CP operating margin ~6.2% within 3.8%-7.9% IQR, CD net margin ~1.8% within 1.2%-3.5% IQR, loan rate 4.5% within 4.3%-5.3% range. Planted error ERR-EU-005: decimal point error in Q3 EURIBOR rate (0.38% instead of 3.80%). 5 file keys with tc09eu_ prefix.

Implemented TC-09-EU OECD transfer pricing documentation variant. 5 input files (3 XLSX + 2 PDF): intercompany transactions (~112 line items across 5 flow types), comparable companies (15 mfg + 10 dist with 5 rejections), interest rate benchmarks with ERR-EU-009 (decimal point error 0.38% vs 3.80%), 28-page master file PDF, 35-page CP local file PDF. Gold standard with manufacturing IQR (3.8%-7.9%), distribution IQR (1.2%-3.5%), loan benchmark (4.3%-5.3%), 11 rubric anchors. 58 tests passing.

Design complete. TC-10-EU replaces US multi-state apportionment with cross-border VAT compliance analysis across NL, DE, FR, UK. Key differentiators from TC-10: transaction-by-transaction VAT classification (not factor-based apportionment), reverse charge mechanism for B2B services, intra-EU supply zero-rating with proof-of-dispatch conditions, UK post-Brexit third-country treatment, VAT PE vs income tax PE distinction. 4 input files (intercompany sales, VAT registrations, VAT returns summary, EU VAT rules reference) with tc10eu_ canary prefix. Planted error ERR-EU-010: CE incorrectly charges 20% French VAT on management fees to CM instead of applying reverse charge under Art. 196. 6 judgment traps including factor-based allocation, UK-as-EU-member, VAT/income-tax PE conflation, and 3 missing-data gaps (Q2 proof of dispatch, unexplained Polish registration, CM Italian sales without registration).

TC-10-EU implementation complete: model (vat_eu.py), formatter (tc10_eu.py), tests (53 passing), pack registered, baseline checksums updated. ERR-EU-010 classification_error planted, 4 canary-embedded files (3 XLSX + 1 DOCX), gold standard with full VAT analysis structure.

Design complete. TC-12-EU replaces US corporate/tax data room docs with European equivalents for Cascade Europe Holdings B.V. group acquisition. 36 files (32 mapped from US + 4 EU-specific: TP master file, GDPR register, works council log, regulatory folder). 8 red flags: DE product liability (€1.8M), CE managing director golden parachute (2.5× above Dutch norm), Rheinstahl change-of-control clause (22% CP revenue), incomplete FR IP assignments, 3 EPO patent expirations, CP Betriebsprüfung in progress, works council consultation gap (§111 BetrVG), GDPR cross-border data transfer without SCCs. Planted error ERR-EU-012: stale Polish VAT ID on UK entity. 70-item DD checklist across 10 categories (adds Regulatory). Gap analysis requires jurisdiction attribution. Judgment traps test for US-centric assumptions.

Implemented TC-12-EU European diligence data room variant — 41 data room files + 1 DD checklist, ERR-EU-012 planted error, gold standard with 8 red flags and 6 judgment traps, rubric, 77 tests passing
